reasoning: Encyclopedia.ushmm.org is the official online encyclopedia of the United States Holocaust Memorial Museum, a federally established and well-known institution dedicated to Holocaust research and education. The source is consistently cited by independent fact-checkers such as Snopes and used in academic curricula, demonstrating strong institutional trust and authority. The USHMM maintains rigorous editorial governance, ethical standards, and a commitment to accuracy, as evidenced by its published materials on Holocaust documentation and educational resources. No evidence of fact-checker failures, propaganda echoing, or reliability concerns was found. Therefore, encyclopedia.ushmm.org merits a highly reliable rating with high confidence.
